Here’s a natural-sounding paragraph incorporating all the key details:

This flavorful Thai dish, Pad Thai, comes together in just 25 minutes—15 minutes of prep and 10 minutes of cooking—making it a great weeknight meal for four. Each serving packs 380 calories, with 22 grams of protein, 45 grams of carbs, and 12 grams of fat, offering a balanced mix of nutrients. Though it has a medium difficulty level, the quick cooking time and bold flavors make it well worth the effort.
